_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 heterozygous mice recapitulate the anthropometric and metabolic features of human neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: The percent fat mass is significantly reduced and lean mass is modestly increased in Nf1 +/− mice when compared with littermate WT mice
details: Percent fat mass significantly reduced and lean mass modestly increased compared to WT mice
